name: Demi Glace- Great Chefs
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the beef bones and place them in a large stockpot. Cover with water and bring to a boil.
2. Continue boiling for 8 to 10 hours until the bones are fully cooked.
3. Strain the liquid, reserving it.
4. Add the chicken bones, vegetables (celery, carrot, onion), bay leaf, garlic, thyme, and reserved beef stock to the pot. Cover with water and bring to a boil.
5. Continue boiling for 4 to 5 hours until the sauce has thickened.
6. Strain the mixture again, reserving the liquid.
7. Combine both stocks in a large saucepan. Bring to a simmer and add the tomato puree. Cook gently for 10 minutes.
8. Increase heat and reduce the sauce until it coats a spoon.
9. Skim any foam or impurities from the surface throughout the reduction process.
10. Once desired consistency is reached, strain the demi-glace again if needed.
11. Serve hot and store leftover portions in an ice cube tray for later use.
